title: Railpack - Railway.app Tool
description: A tool or framework for simplifying application development workflows, integrated with Railway.app's cloud infrastructure.

concepts.name: Railpack
concepts.definition: A tool/framework for building applications, focusing on streamlining development workflows like scaffolding and deployment.

concepts.name: Railway.app Integration
concepts.description: Seamless integration with Railway's cloud platform for deploying and managing applications.

concepts.name: Cloud Development Workflow
concepts.definition: A development approach leveraging pre-configured cloud environments for faster iteration and deployment.

concepts.name: Application Scaffolding
concepts.description: Automated generation of project structures or templates to kickstart development.

concepts.name: Open-Source Collaboration
concepts.definition: A GitHub-hosted repository for community-driven contributions, issues, and feature requests.
